scripts.install:all: concurrently -n db,api,web "npm --prefix packages/db install" "npm --prefix apps/api install" "npm --prefix apps/web install"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install:all && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:generate && npm --prefix packages/db exec prisma db seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
